```python
def place_odcs(instance, n_active):
    # Cópia das coordenadas dos sites e clientes
    site_coords = instance.site_coords.copy()
    client_coords = instance.client_coords.copy()
    distances = instance.distances.copy()
    client_demand = instance.client_demand.copy()

    # Seleção inicial com os sites que atendem mais clientes
    client-site_dist = np.argmin(distances, axis=1)
    site_client_count = np.zeros(instance.n_sites)
    for i in range(instance.n_clients):
        site_client_count[client_site_dist[i]] += 1

    selected_sites = np.argsort(-site_client_count)[:n_active]

    # Verifica a viabilidade
    for client in range(instance.n_clients):
        min_distance = np.min(distances[client, selected_sites])
        if min_distance > instance.max_distance:
            return None  # Solução inviável

    # Verifica a capacidade
    site_capacity = np.zeros(n_active)
    for client in range(instance.n_clients):
        site_idx = np.argmin(distances[client, selected_sites])
        site_capacity[site_idx] += client_demand[client]
    if np.any(site_capacity > instance.max_capacity):
        return None  # Solução inviável

    return selected_sites
```
